---
title: "Presentations"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---

**Upcoming:** I will be presenting in Nordstat 2023 on the 19th of June, 2023.

**Past:** The list is not complete but I am happy to have presented at the following events

-   BayesComp 2023. Poster.

-   ICSDS 2022, Florence, Italy 2022. Student travel award given by the IMS.

-
